message:
Adopt Rust idioms in Result and add unit_to_void utility

Rename Result::value() to Result::unwrap() for consistency with
Rust conventions and the existing unwrap_err() method. Add a
unit_to_void<T>() utility function that converts VoidToUnit<T>
back to T, properly handling the void case.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
